name_cn:
Authentic Grade
5BH211: New Season Miu Miu Accessories Collection Handbag, iconic Matelasse embossed lambskin, unique Miu design, exquisite shoulder strap adorned with faux pearls, exuding a unique charm. The bag design reflects a refined and elegant style.
Front features metal-engraved logo
Zipper closure
Satin and soft calfskin pockets
Height 16.5cm
Length 21cm
Width 5.5 cm (with original packaging)
